title: AMC 2025 Q4 Results Summary
text:
AMC Entertainment Holdings posted a net loss of $127.4 million for the fourth quarter, or 25 cents per share. On an adjusted basis (excluding one-time items), the loss was 18 cents per share, which exceeded analyst expectations of a 20 cents-per-share loss.

REVENUE FIGURES
The theater chain generated $1.29 billion in quarterly revenue. For the full year, the company reported annual revenue of $4.85 billion with a total loss of $632.4 million ($1.34 per share).

STOCK PERFORMANCE
Shares closed at $1.20, representing a significant decline from $3.43 one year prior—a drop of approximately 65% year-over-year.

CONTEXT
The report notes that a survey of four analysts conducted by Zacks Investment Research had projected a larger loss of 20 cents per share, indicating the adjusted results came in better than Wall Street anticipated despite the overall challenging financial picture for the theater chain.
